root_causes.widget_recolor: The shared color runtime set --panel-accent on widgets, but late object material rules kept the widget card body on the fixed glass surface. Only tool buttons visibly changed.
root_causes.clear_color: A missing color serialized the same as an uncustomized object, so hydration fell back to each object's default theme color.
root_causes.panel_internal_move: Absorption cloned the widget while its tool drawer was portalled to the overlay, leaving the panel-contained clone without its customization drawer and move handle.

fixes.widget_recolor: User-selected widget colors get data-panel-color-user=true and a scoped body tint using --panel-accent.
fixes.clear_color: The shared color menu exposes No color and persists colorCleared separately from color.
fixes.panel_internal_move: The widget drawer is restored before absorption cloning so the child widget can reopen customization and move inside the panel.
